vision: A lightweight mobile application that helps individuals manage daily tasks efficiently through simple creation, tracking, and completion of personal to-do items.

epics.name: Task Creation and Management
epics.description: Core functionality allowing users to create, edit, and delete tasks to maintain their personal to-do list

stories.title: Create a new task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture items I need to accomplish
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title and confirm Then a new task appears in my task list with the entered title
Given I am creating a new task When I leave the title empty and try to confirm Then the task is not created and I see a validation message

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I select a due date from the date picker Then the task is created with the selected due date displayed
Given I am creating a new task When I skip the due date field Then the task is created without a due date

stories.title: Edit existing task title or due date
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to edit an existing task's title or due date, so that I can correct mistakes or update task details
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task When I tap on the task to edit and change the title and save Then the task displays the updated title
Given I have an existing task with a due date When I edit and change the due date and save Then the task displays the updated due date
Given I have an existing task When I edit and remove the due date and save Then the task no longer displays a due date

stories.title: Delete a task from the list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task from my list, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task When I select delete on the task and confirm the deletion Then the task is permanently removed from my list
Given I initiate task deletion When I am prompted to confirm Then I can cancel and the task remains in my list
stories.notes: Include confirmation to prevent accidental deletion

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Functionality enabling users to mark tasks as complete and track their progress

stories.title: Mark a task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and feel a sense of accomplishment
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I tap the completion checkbox or button Then the task is marked as complete
Given I have a complete task When I tap the completion checkbox or button Then the task is marked as incomplete

stories.title: Visual distinction for complete tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want complete tasks to be visually distinct from incomplete tasks, so that I can quickly scan and identify what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When a task is marked complete Then it displays with strikethrough text or dimmed appearance
Given I am viewing my task list When a task is incomplete Then it displays with normal text styling clearly distinguishable from complete tasks

epics.name: Task List Viewing
epics.description: Features for viewing and filtering the task list to help users focus on relevant items

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a single list, so that I can see everything I need to accomplish
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a scrollable list
Given I have no tasks When I open the app Then I see an empty state message encouraging me to add a task

stories.title: Filter to show only incomplete tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I have the incomplete filter active When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed again

stories.title: Filter to show only complete tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only complete tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the complete filter Then only complete tasks are displayed
Given I have the complete filter active When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed again

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensuring tasks are saved and persist between app sessions for reliable task tracking

stories.title: Persist tasks between app sessions
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved automatically, so that I don't lose my data when I close and reopen the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close the app and reopen it Then all my previously created tasks are displayed
Given I have marked tasks as complete When I close the app and reopen it Then the completion status is preserved
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - critical for app to be usable; implement local storage

stories.title: Persist task edits automatically
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my task edits to be saved automatically, so that my changes are never lost
acceptance_criteria: Given I edit a task's title or due date When I save the edit and close the app Then the edited values persist when I reopen the app
Given I delete a task When I close the app and reopen it Then the deleted task does not reappear
stories.notes: Builds on persistence infrastructure from US-010

epics.name: Performance and User Experience
epics.description: Non-functional requirements ensuring the app is responsive and pleasant to use

stories.title: Load task list within two seconds
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want the app to load my task list quickly, so that I can access my tasks without frustrating delays
acceptance_criteria: Given I have up to 100 tasks When I launch the app Then the task list is fully displayed within 2 seconds
Given I am loading the task list When the load takes longer than expected Then a loading indicator is displayed
stories.notes: Performance optimization pass; may require profiling

stories.title: Responsive touch interactions on mobile
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want touch interactions to respond immediately, so that the app feels smooth and native
acceptance_criteria: Given I tap any interactive element When the tap is registered Then visual feedback is displayed within 100 milliseconds
Given I am scrolling the task list When I scroll Then the list scrolls smoothly at 60 frames per second
